zh.Hampton Court, Herefordshire, England, U: 英國英格蘭賀福爾咸頓 考特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Rowland Lenthale於1399年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾咸頓 考特時，他的父親Roger Lenthall II55歲，母親Margaret50歲。他於1424年與Lucy Grey在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年11月25日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Rowland Lenthale于1399年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾咸頓 考特时，他的父亲Roger Lenthall II55岁，母亲Margaret50岁。他于1424年与Lucy Grey在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年11月25日在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lenthale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2 English: nickname, perhaps from Middle English, Old French lentil ‘lentil’, perhaps given to someone who grew or sold lentil seeds, used in cooking.

nameMeanings.name: Rowland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roland  , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Roland
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + land ‘land, territory’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In Old French literature it is borne by a legendary Frankish hero, a vassal of Charlemagne, whose exploits are told in the Chanson de Roland. The subject of the poem is Roland's death at the Battle of Roncesvalles in the Pyrenees in 778 , while protecting the rearguard of the Frankish army on its retreat from Spain. Roland is depicted in literature and legend as headstrong and impulsive. His devoted friendship with the prudent Oliver is also legendary.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Rowland Lenthale was born in 1399, in Hampton Court, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Lenthall II, was 55 and his mother, Margaret, was 50. He married Lucy Grey in 1424, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 25 November 1450, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Rowland Lenthale est né en 1399, à Hampton Court, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Lenthall II, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Lucy Grey en 1424, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1450, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Rowland Lenthale 1399 in Hampton Court, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Lenthall II 55 und seine Mutter Margaret 50. Er hat 1424 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Lucy Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. November 1450 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Rowland Lenthaleが1399年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハンプトン コウルトで生まれた時，父Roger Lenthall IIは55歳，母Margaretは50歳であった。1424年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでLucy Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年11月25日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Rowland Lenthale(이)가 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 함프턴 쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Lenthall II(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 Lucy Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 11월 25일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Rowland Lenthale родился в 1399 г. в местности хамптон коурт, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Lenthall II было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Grey в 1424 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 ноября 1450 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.
